sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2833" key="a)kaqarti/zomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκᾰθαρ-τίζομαι</orth>, <sense id="n2833.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be ceremonially unclean</tr_>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l.</abbr> ib. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0527.tlg003:14:36" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14.36</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
